settings.title: Curl your natural lashes.
settings.description: Start with your own lashes curled — it helps the band sit flush.

settings.title: Brush on the fixer.
settings.description: A thin coat along your lash line. Let it turn tacky before the lash.

settings.title: Place the lash — blue dot up, white dot down.
settings.description: Match the magnets: the blue marker sits on top, the white below.

settings.title: Align to your lash line and set.
settings.description: Lay it along the lash line and press gently to lock the magnets.

settings.title: Peel off in one go.
settings.description: At the end of the night, lift from the outer corner — off in one piece.
